          {
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 259,
            "text": "    public async Task\u003cstring?\u003e GetContentShaAsync("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260,
            "text": "        string owner,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261,
            "text": "        string repo,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "        string branch,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263,
            "text": "        string remotePath,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264,
            "text": "        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265,
            "text": "    {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266,
            "text": "        var query = $\"?ref={Uri.EscapeDataString(branch)}\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 267,
            "text": "        var url = $\"repos/{EscapePathSegment(owner)}/{EscapePathSegment(repo)}/contents/{EscapeContentPath(remotePath)}{query}\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269,
            "text": "        using var request = new HttpRequestMessage(HttpMethod.Get, url);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270,
            "text": "        using var response = await _httpClient.SendAsync(request, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(false);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272,
            "text": "        if (response.StatusCode == HttpStatusCode.NotFound)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273,
            "text": "        {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274,
            "text": "            return null;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277,
            "text": "        var body = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync(cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(false);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278,
            "text": "        if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279,
            "text": "        {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280,
            "text": "            return null;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 281,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 282
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283,
            "text": "        try"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284,
            "text": "        {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285,
            "text": "            using var doc = JsonDocument.Parse(body);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 286,
            "text": "            if (doc.RootElement.TryGetProperty(\"sha\", out var sha))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 287,
            "text": "            {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288,
            "text": "                return sha.GetString();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289,
            "text": "            }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 290,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291,
            "text": "        catch"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 292,
            "text": "        {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293,
            "text": "            // ignore"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 296,
            "text": "        return null;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 297,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 298
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 299,
            "text": "    public async Task\u003cUploadContentResult\u003e UploadContentAsync("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 300,
            "text": "        string owner,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 301,
            "text": "        string repo,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 302,
            "text": "        string branch,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 303,
            "text": "        string remotePath,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 304,
            "text": "        string commitMessage,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 305,
            "text": "        byte[] fileBytes,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 306,
            "text": "        string? committerName,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 307,
            "text": "        string? committerEmail,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 308,
            "text": "        CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 309,
            "text": "    {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 310,
            "text": "        var existingSha = await GetContentShaAsync(owner, repo, branch, remotePath, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(false);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 311
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 312,
            "text": "        var payload = new Dictionary\u003cstring, object?\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 313,
            "text": "        {"

            "lineNumber": 700,
            "text": "        return new HttpRequestMessage(method, $\"repos/{EscapePathSegment(owner)}/{EscapePathSegment(repo)}/contents/{EscapeContentPath(remotePath)}\")"

          },

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
进度显示采用固定百分比分段：处理阶段显示 40%，GitHub 上传后显示 100%。这种固定分段机制导致上传到 40% 时出现明显的卡顿。

40% 到 100% 的 GitHub API 阶段包含额外的 HTTP 请求和 CPU 密集型操作，导致该阶段无进度反馈。计划将进度拆分为更细粒度的中间阶段，例如在检查远程文件前更新到 45%，让用户感知到持续的上传进展。

进一步细化了进度拆分方案：考虑在 GetContentSha</details></think>
